# terrible_community_general_kernel_blacklist (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Name of kernel module to black- or whitelist.

### Optional

- `blacklist_file` (String) If specified, use this blacklist file instead of `/etc/modprobe.d/blacklist-ansible.conf`.
- `state` (String) Whether the module should be present in the blacklist or absent.
